sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL INC /MD/는 2025-09-30 분기에 매출 64억 8,900만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 회사는 2024년 10-K 보고서에 명시된 회계 정책 및 추정치를 일관되게 적용하고 있으며, 재무제표 작성 과정에서 중대한 변경 사항은 없습니다.
장기 부채 및 현금 요구 사항에 대한 정보는 2024년 10-K 보고서의 공시 내용을 유지하며 재무적 안정성을 관리하고 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: 내부 통제 시스템 설계는 미래 사건의 가능성에 대한 가정에 기반하며, 모든 잠재적 미래 조건에서 완벽한 성공을 보장할 수는 없습니다.

businessChanges.text: 재무제표 작성 시 GAAP에 따라 경영진의 복잡한 판단이 요구되는 추정치를 사용하고 있으나, 방법론적 변경은 없습니다.
공시 통제 및 절차에 대한 평가 결과, 경영진은 정보의 적시 보고와 의사결정을 지원하는 시스템이 효과적으로 작동하고 있다고 판단했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 순이익은 7억 2,800만 달러이며, 총자산 278억 3,300만 달러와 현금및현금성자산 6억 7,800만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 회계 정책의 일관성과 내부 통제 시스템의 안정성을 강조하고 있어, 향후 거시경제 변동성 확대 시에도 기존의 리스크 관리 체계가 유효할지 모니터링이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-09-30 revenue = 64억 8,900만 달러 (USD 6.489B; 6,489 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 operating income = 11억 8,000만 달러 (USD 1.18B; 1,180 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 net income = 7억 2,800만 달러 (USD 0.728B; 728 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 total assets = 278억 3,300만 달러 (USD 27.833B; 27,833 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 cash and cash equivalents = 6억 7,800만 달러 (USD 0.678B; 678 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.

Also, see Note 7 for information on our long-term debt. CRITICAL ACCOUNTING POLICIES AND ESTIMATES Our preparation of financial statements in accordance with GAAP requires management to make estimates and assumptions that affect reported amounts and related disclosures. We have discussed those policies and estimates that we believe are critical and require the use of complex judgment in their application in our 2024 Form 10-K. We have made no material changes to our critical accounting policies or the methodologies or assumptions that we apply under them. Item 3. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk Our exposure to market risk has not materially changed since December 31, 2024. See Part II, Item 7A, “Quantita

Results of Operations,” of our 2024 Form 10-K for more information about our cash requirements. Also, see Note 7 for information on our long-term debt. We have discussed those policies and estimates that we believe are critical and require the use of complex judgment in their application in our 2024 Form 10-K. tive and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk” in our 2024 Form 10-K for more information on our exposure to market risk. 24 Table of Contents Item 4. Controls and Procedures Disclosure Controls and Procedures We evaluated the effectiveness of our disclosure controls and procedures (as such term is defined in Rules 13a-15(e) and 15d-15(e) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (the “Exchange Act”)) as of the end of the period covered by this quarterly report under the supervision and with the participation of our management, including our Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer. Management necessarily applied its judgment in assessing the costs and benefits of those controls and procedures, which by their nature, can provide only reasonable assurance about management’s control objectives. You should note that the design of any system of controls is based in part upon

certain assumptions about the likelihood of future events, and we cannot assure you that any design will succeed in achieving its stated goals under all potential future conditions, regardless of how remote. Based upon this evaluation, our Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer concluded that our disclosure controls and procedures were effective and operating to provide reasonable assurance that we record, process, summarize, and report the information we are required to disclose in the reports that we file or submit under the Exchange Act within the time periods specified in the rules and forms of the SEC, and to provide reasonable assurance that we accumulate and communicate such information to our management, including our Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer, as appropriate to allow timely decisions about required disclosure. Changes in Internal Control Ov

er Financial Reporting We made no changes in internal control over financial reporting during the 2025 third quarter that materially affected, or are reasonably likely to materially affect, our internal control over financial reporting. 25 Table of Contents
